entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURAL MODEL
entities.description: A model for agriculture that is sustainable over the long term.

entities.name: GREEN REVOLUTION
entities.description: The period of agricultural intensification in the 1960s.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Climate-change related drought episodes affecting crops.

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL-STRUCTURAL PLANT MODELS
entities.description: Models used to complement and rationalize breeding approaches by integrating structure and function.

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of improving plant traits through selective breeding.

entities.name: ROOT SYSTEMS
entities.description: The underground organ system of a plant, viewed as a source for plant amelioration.

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand drought conditions.

entities.name: RSA PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of measuring and analyzing root system architecture.

entities.name: ROOT SYSTEM ARCHITECTURE
entities.description: The spatial configuration of the root system.

entities.name: QTL
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Loci used to support the manipulation of root system architecture.

entities.name: DROUGHT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The capacity of a plant to resist the negative effects of drought.

entities.name: ARCHITECTURAL MODELS
entities.description: Models that represent the physical structure of root systems.

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL HYDRAULIC MODELS
entities.description: Models that simulate the movement of water within the root system.

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL PARAMETERS
entities.description: Measurable values used to feed functional hydraulic models.

entities.name: SIMULATIONS
entities.description: The use of models to predict plant behavior under specific conditions.

entities.name: EXPERIMENTATIONS
entities.description: Empirical tests used to validate hydraulic models.
